subject: New Opening: Java Developer – Java – Public sector
body:
Hi,

I'm writing to share a new consultant request that has just come in.

CLIENT: Statsportalen
ROLE: Architect Java Developer
START: 2023-12-19
DURATION: 12 months
LOCATION: Göteborg / hybrid
RATE: 1225 SEK/h

The team works primarily with Java, Azure, Docker Compose and Oracle.

Key requirements:

  • Java
  • Azure
  • Docker Compose
  • Oracle

Don't hesitate to reach out with any questions.

Best regards,
Alicia Strand
Talent Scout
ByteForce
Tel: +46 70 788 90 12
